indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX jobs_main_index ON graphile_worker._private_jobs USING btree (priority, run_at) INCLUDE (id, task_id, job_queue_id) WHERE (is_available = true)
CREATE INDEX jobs_no_queue_index ON graphile_worker._private_jobs USING btree (priority, run_at) INCLUDE (id, task_id) WHERE ((is_available = true) AND (job_queue_id IS NULL))
